summary.headline: Bunge extends exchange offers for Viterra notes until March 7, 2025.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. extended the expiration date of its exchange offers and consent solicitations related to Viterra's debt securities from February 3, 2025, to March 7, 2025.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. extended the expiration date of its exchange offers and consent solicitations related to Viterra's debt securities.

extraction_notes: Numbers from the filing; cover sheet only had Item references
